title: Relocating Your Office to the Eagle Hills La Gare Development: Luxury Logistics for Premium Modern High-Rises
excerpt: Eagle Hills La Gare office relocation: luxury logistics, premium high-rise moves, freight elevators, corporate FF&E, modern development Addis Ababa commercial moving.
content:
Relocating your office to the Eagle Hills La Gare development: luxury logistics for premium modern high-rises

Eagle Hills La Gare represents premium modern high-rise ambition—marble lobbies, strict management, freight elevators with deposits, and corporate tenants who cannot afford scratched stone or Monday without fiber. Office relocation here is luxury logistics: timed freight slots, floor protection mandatory, and FF&E moves that look invisible to other tenants.

This guide covers corporate office relocations into Eagle Hills La Gare development.

Building management onboarding

  • Register move date minimum two weeks ahead—often longer peak season.
  • Insurance certificate naming building and coverage limits.
  • Freight elevator reservation with overtime penalties documented.
  • Floor and wall protection standards—corrugated plus Masonite typical.
  • After-hours or weekend window preference for minimal tenant disruption.

FF&E and IT coordination

Executive suites disassembled labeled; workstations color-coded by floor zone. IT rack migration parallel vendor—power and cooling verified destination IDF room before truck. Art and reception statement pieces crated separate tier.

Parking and truck access

Basement loading bay queue—single truck slot timed. Height clearance confirm before high-cube dispatch. Valet and visitor lanes must not block—fines immediate.

Phased move for premium continuity

Friday night infrastructure; Saturday FF&E; Sunday IT smoke test; Monday staffed reception. Signage and branding install coordinated post-furniture.

Security and discretion

Crew ID badges building-issued; manifest at gate; no photography in lobby without permission.

Budget realism

Luxury logistics premium over standard commercial—management fees, protection materials, overtime elevator—quote line-item not surprise.

Active Movers La Gare commercial tier

Provide floor count, workstation total, and management contact—references from premium tower moves available.

Conclusion

La Gare office moves demand management compliance, protected freight slots, phased IT-FF&E waves, and discretion—luxury logistics is tenant experience preserved while desks relocate silently.
author: Active Movers Team
